title: Loot Randomizer
description: Random Block drops, can also randomize chest and entity loot.
body:
This datapack adds random block drops. If you want more things to be random check my [Randomizer: Complete Edition](https://modrinth.com/datapack/randomizer-complete-edition) out!

Quilt: You need [QSL](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl), otherwise it won't work.

Features:
- randomized blocks drops
- blocks can also drop items (e.g. Swords; Potions)
- blocks can also drop chest loot (e.g. Desert Temple)
